schema_alignment.normalized_shades.csv: maps to brand/product_line/sub_range/shade seed records; modifiers remain shade_category=modifier because current shape lacks tone_modifier table
schema_alignment.normalized_technical_rules.csv: maps to line_technical_rule and formulation_rule depending on import target
schema_alignment.formula_recreation_rules.csv: maps best to a shade_formula_recreation_rule/stage migration table; can also be imported as formulation_rule entries with category intermixing/correction

review_flags: The source is a short quick starter guide, not a full global shade book. Rows are manufacturer-stated from visible chart pages but regional availability may vary.
Historical/current shade recreation formulas are not normal shade inventory; keep separate from active shade records.
